query: SELECT game_date, source, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'hit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hits, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'miss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as misses, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending FROM daily_results GROUP BY game_date, source ORDER BY game_date DESC LIMIT 20;
